{{Quote|It is simply the turning of history, where the old is swept away by the better new.|translated=1|Naleshekan's thoughts on the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Naleshekan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived in [[Ahto City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a judge within the [[Ahto City Civil Authority]]'s court. A moderate supporter of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], Naleshekan saw the Sith conquest as an inevitable process of history, the result of which would see the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|old government]] replaced by a new, supposedly better one.

He, along with his fellow judges, presided over the [[Sunry]] case as well as both trials in which the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] was a defendant; these included the [[Raid on the Sith Embassy]] and the aftermath of the demise of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Hrakert Station]].
